aboutPreview.title: Art Born from the Stars
aboutPreview.p1: Dracon is a digital art studio specializing in fantasy illustration, concept art and animation. Each piece is a journey through arcane worlds where magic flows between constellations and ancestral symbols.
aboutPreview.p2: Inspired by mythology, astrology and the mysteries of the cosmos, each piece carries the essence of fantastic universes waiting to be discovered.

cta.title: Transform Your Vision into Art
cta.subtitle: Commission a unique illustration, concept art or animation. Each project is a magical collaboration between your vision and Dracon's art.

header.title: About Dracon
header.subtitle: A journey among stars, runes and fantastic worlds — where every stroke carries the magic of the invisible and the beauty of the arcane.

story.title: The Artist Behind the Magic
story.p1: Dracon was born from the fusion between imagination and an obsession with fantastic worlds. As a digital artist, my work is a constant exploration of the boundaries between the real and the supernatural.
story.p2: Each illustration tells a story that transcends the visual — they are portals to universes where dragons guard ancestral secrets, where constellations trace destinies and where magic is the fundamental language of all creation.
story.p3: I work with a deep palette of purples and oranges, evoking the atmosphere of cosmic nights illuminated by distant stars. The arcane and mystic aesthetic is the signature of every piece I create.
story.p4: My goal is to transform visions into art — whether for an RPG character, a fiction world, a book cover or a mesmerizing animation.

skills.title: Arcane Skills
skills.subtitle: Technical and artistic mastery forged through years of practice and passion for art.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.subtitle: The milestones of Dracon's artistic journey through the years.

header.title: Services
header.subtitle: Transform your vision into art. Every project is treated with artisanal dedication and a passion for the fantastic.

items.title: Custom Illustration
items.shortDescription: Original fantasy and magic illustrations made to order.
items.description: Creation of unique and personalized illustrations with fantasy, magic and mystic themes. Each piece is created from scratch, from sketch to the final high-resolution art.
items.priceNote: Price varies by complexity and size

items.title: Concept Art
items.shortDescription: Visual design of characters, creatures and environments.
items.description: Visual concept development for games, films, books and creative projects. Includes character, environment and creature design with arcane aesthetics.

items.title: 2D Animation
items.shortDescription: Short animations and loops with mystic themes.
items.description: Short animations, loops and motion graphics with mystic and fantastic aesthetics. Ideal for social media, video intros and artistic projects.

items.title: Character Design
items.shortDescription: Original characters with full reference sheet.
items.description: Complete creation of original characters with reference sheet, poses, expressions and equipment/clothing details.

hero.title: DRAGON EYES
hero.subtitle: Seven stars. Seven guardians. A constellation that holds the secrets of the oldest power in the cosmos.

constellation.title: The Dragon Constellation
constellation.subtitle: Each star represents a cosmic guardian. Explore their secrets.
constellation.hint: ✦ Hover over a star to discover the character ✦

lyra.name: Lyra
lyra.description: Born under the meteor shower of Aldebaran, Lyra sees the threads of fate intertwined in the stars. Her eyes reflect constellations that others cannot see.

ignis.name: Ignis
ignis.description: Forged in the primordial flames, Ignis carries within him the fire that gave birth to the first sun. His gaze can melt steel and illuminate the deepest darkness.

nyx.name: Nyx
nyx.description: Daughter of the eternal night, Nyx moves between dimensions like a cold breeze. Her dark wings carry secrets that not even the gods dare to speak.

aurion.name: Aurion
aurion.description: Last descendant of the Knights of Orion, Aurion wields the sword that cuts between realities. He swore to protect the balance between light and darkness.

seraph.name: Seraph
seraph.description: The oldest of magical beings, Seraph witnessed the birth and death of countless stars. His eyes — the Dragon Eyes — are the key to all cosmic power.

elara.name: Elara
elara.description: Connected to the heart of the earth, Elara channels the vital energy of ancient roots. Where she steps, flowers bloom — where she cries, entire forests awaken.

zephyr.name: Zephyr
zephyr.description: Swift as thought, Zephyr travels the skies carrying messages between realms. They say he whispers prophecies to those about to change the world.

chapters.title: The Origin
chapters.text: In the beginning, before time had a name, there were only the Dragon Eyes — seven primordial stars that watched the infinite void. Each star carried within it a spark of consciousness, a fragment of power that would shape all existence.

chapters.title: The Awakening
chapters.text: When the first star blinked, the universe trembled. The energy released created the first forms of life — beings made of light and shadow, connected to the stars by invisible threads of magic. These beings became the guardians of cosmic balance.

chapters.title: The War of Constellations
chapters.text: But power attracts ambition. An entity of the void, known only as The Eclipse, tried to devour the Dragon Eyes to rewrite reality. The guardians united in the Dragon Constellation — a legendary formation that channels the combined power of all stars.

chapters.title: The Legacy
chapters.text: The war had no winner — only survivors. The guardians scattered across the realms, each carrying the memory of their star. They say that when the seven reunite, the Dragon Constellation will shine again and the fate of the cosmos will be decided.

gallery.title: Project Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Concept art, character studies and scenes from the Dragon Eyes universe.

cta.title: This is just the beginning
cta.subtitle: Dragon Eyes is a constantly evolving project. New characters, chapters and art will be added as the universe expands.

error.heading: Disturbance in the Arcane Flow
error.message: An unstable energy interrupted the enchantment. Try again or return to the main portal.
